Cloudburst AI Product Careers Blog

Build the future of AI infrastructure

We're a Series B startup ($45M raised) making GPU clusters accessible to every developer.

Engineering

Staff ML Infrastructure Engineer

San Francisco, CA Full-time $250,000 - $320,000 + equity

Design and scale our distributed training infrastructure. You'll work on custom schedulers, multi-node GPU orchestration, and fault-tolerant training pipelines.

  • 7+ years in distributed systems or ML infrastructure
  • Deep experience with CUDA, NCCL, or similar GPU programming
  • Track record of building production ML systems at scale

Senior Frontend Engineer

Remote (US/EU) Full-time $180,000 - $230,000 + equity

Build the dashboard and developer tools that thousands of ML engineers use daily.

Go-to-Market

Solutions Architect

New York, NY or Remote Full-time

Partner with enterprise customers to design GPU infrastructure solutions. Technical sales background required.

Technical Writer

Remote Part-time

Create tutorials, API documentation, and developer guides for our GPU orchestration platform.
